subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The pure hem hath been sullied with the dust of calumnies from the slanderers, and the Lamp of the horizons by the blowing of winds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق ذیل مطهر بغبار افتراء مفترین آلوده شده و سراج آفاق از هبوب اریاح
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @idolatry, @knowledge; recognition of God
